privileged_info_summary: The task 'chinook_streaming_schema_evolution@1' starts with the real Chinook Database, a well-known open-source sample database from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database. The Chinook database contains 59 customers, 3503 tracks, 347 albums, and 275 artists across 11 tables. All metadata configuration values are verified as correct: db_path (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_streaming.db), script_path (/home/ga/Documents/scripts/streaming_migration.sql), connection_name (ChinookStreaming), expected_tables (subscription_plans, listening_history), and expected_indexes (idx_listening_customer, idx_listening_track). The task requires adding two columns to existing tables (SubscriptionPlanId to customers and PlayCount to tracks) and creating two new tables with synthetic data specified in the task requirements.
